content.en:
"Ten Arms Golden Body!"

Ye Tian was really moved by this immeasurable supernatural technique, this is the ninth place on the list of immeasurable supernatural powers!

His immeasurable feather armor and other immeasurable supernatural power techniques were obtained from Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, although they were also top-notch immeasurable supernatural powers, but compared to the ten-armed golden body, it was quite ordinary, not a level at all.

Therefore, he had to bid for this ten-armed golden body immeasurable supernatural power inheritance!

Soon, the auction began.

Because the starting price is too high, there are very few great ancestors who bid for the inheritance of the immeasurable magic technique of the ten-armed golden body.

In fact, there are many forces that can shoot the ten-armed golden body, but it's not worth it for them!

If no one can train into a ten-armed golden body, then it would be a waste of resources to shoot it at such a big price!

"1,500,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!"

After Ye Tian quoted this price, there was no ancestor to continue to follow.

In this way, Ye Tian won the auction at the price of 1.5 million Heavenly Realm gold coins.

......

"Endless Great Ancestor, you actually have so many Heavenly Realm gold coins!"

The Blood Ancestor was shocked.

Even he didn't have so many Infinite Realm Gold Coins, and where did the Endless Great Ancestor get so much wealth?

A mere relic stone tower definitely didn't have any high-level treasures, so it couldn't trade many Infinite Realm gold coins.

Where does Ye Tian's wealth come from?

He has a background, but Ye Tian doesn't have any background!

"Could it be that this Endless Great Ancestor has been accepted as a disciple by a certain Heavenly Ancestor?"

The Blood Ancestor thought so.

After all, he couldn't think of any other reason than this.

"Luckily, I found a gold vein in the Heavenly Realm!"

Ye Tian said.

"What, a vein of gold in the Heavenly Realm!"

The Blood Ancestor was really envious, this should still be a large Tongtian Realm gold vein, after all, one piece of Tongtian Realm gold can refine ten Tongtian Realm gold coins at most.

1,500,000 Boundless Gold Coins is equivalent to 150,000 Infinite Boundary Gold, which must require a large Infinite Boundary Gold Vein to be born.

The auction continued, but there weren't many lots left behind.

And the next auction items were all unimaginably attractive to the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, but they were of little use to Ye Tian at the moment, so he did not participate in the bidding.

It wasn't long before the final lot was presented.

"Next is the last auction item - a Nine Dragons liquid!"

Xue Yao Ancestor said.

As soon as they heard that it was still Nine Dragon Liquid, many Great Ancestors were shocked and full of eagerness.

The Nine Dragons Liquid is refined according to the formula of the Nine Dragons Liquid using Tongtian True Gold and many rare materials, which can help the Great Ancestor at the peak of the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform to impact the Heavenly Ancestor level.

Of course, Kowloon Liquid does not have a 100% success rate, only a 30% success rate.

But even so, the Nine Dragons Liquid was enough to make the hearts of countless fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms excited!

"There will be Nine Dragons liquid in this auction, it must not be taken out by Taichen Palace, otherwise Taichen Palace will use it itself!"

"It's possible that a certain Great Ancestor has refined two copies and put one out for auction!"

"Whatever the reason, this is my chance!"

And some Great Ancestors had already received information that there would be Nine Dragons Liquid in this auction, so they prepared a large number of Tongtian Realm gold coins.

The starting price of Nine Dragon Liquid is also very high, directly as high as 10 million Heavenly Realm gold coins.

"My ten pieces of Tongtian True Gold can't be exchanged for this Nine Dragons liquid!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, the auction began!

Ye Tian originally thought that there were not many great ancestors in the auction, after all, this was as high as 10 million Heavenly Realm gold coins!

But he was immediately dumbfounded, and there were more than a dozen Great Ancestors in the auction.

Obviously, this time it's more than a dozen forces playing together!

11,000,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!

12,000,000 Heavenly Gold Coins!

13,000,000 Heavenly Gold Coins!

The competition among these forces was fierce, as if the Heavenly Realm Gold Coin was just a number to them.

"These forces are really rich, if it weren't for my ability to fuse everything, I really can't compare to them!" Ye Tian said darkly.

If he used Tongtian True Gold to exchange Tongtian Realm Gold Coin from Taiyuan Palace, he would indeed be able to take this Nine Dragons Liquid 100%.

However, there is no need for that.

He didn't want to be the target of public criticism, if he obtained the Nine Dragons Liquid formula in the future, he could completely refine the Nine Dragons Liquid by himself.

In the end, Jiulong Liquid was auctioned away by a party at a terrifying auction price of 23 million Heavenly Realm gold coins.

At this point, the Taichen auction is over.

......

Ye Tian came out of the auction hall, not only with some more gold coins from the Heavenly Realm, but also with some more Crystal Hearts and the inheritance of the immeasurable magic of the ten-armed golden body.

At this moment, he clearly felt that many Great Ancestors' eyes were focused on him, and he obviously had some thoughts about him.

Of course, they didn't dare to make a move here, otherwise they would anger Taichen Palace.

The free trade fair was still going on, but Ye Tian was not ready to stay here, he wanted to go back.

So, he left here directly and returned to the Xuanqi realm.

Those Great Ancestors didn't know that Ye Tian was the Great Ancestor of the Xuanqi Realm, and even if they knew, it would not be easy to cross the Infinite Realm Ruins and come to the Xuanqi Realm!

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't need to worry about being attacked by those fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Ruins of stone towers.

After Ye Tian returned, he began to retreat.

This time, he asked for the immeasurable magic skill of the Infinite Feather Armor.

As for the ten-armed golden body, it was impossible for him to cultivate it for the time being, so he was not in a hurry to cultivate.

"The five materials of the Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing, the Thousand Dao Golden Liquid, the Ancient Stygian Wood, the Divine Blood Breath, and the Heart of the Crystal are all available, and now we are using these five materials to integrate into the depths of the Infinite Bone, fuse with the power of the Infinite Divine Power Seed Imprint, and then slowly cultivate according to the cultivation method of the Infinite Feather Armor Inheritance, and intervene in the power of the Seed Imprint!"

Ye Tian took out these five materials, and then began to cultivate.

Rumble!!!!

The five materials gradually merged into the Infinite Bone, and under Ye Tian's control, the power of the Infinite Feather Armor Mark was gradually formed.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's immeasurable feather armor mark gradually formed.

Airplanes!

The immeasurable feather armor mark was completely formed.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited, he had practiced it in one wash, if he failed, his materials would not be enough, after all, there was only one Dragon Scale Saint Xuanjing!

The immeasurable feather armor mark is formed, and as long as he becomes a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, he can give birth to the true immeasurable feather armor immeasurable supernatural technique.

"Next, accept the inheritance of the immeasurable magic technique of the ten-armed golden body, and see what this immeasurable magic skill looks like!"

Ye Tian muttered.
